headline: Cleaner starts, faster boards
summary: RefBoard opens large boards faster, starts fresh on launch, and restores your file previews.

new.title: Choose when to restore
new.description: RefBoard now opens to your home screen. If you left unsaved work, a card offers to restore it — so you start fresh unless you choose otherwise.

improved.title: Faster board opening
improved.description: Large boards open roughly twice as fast, showing your images sooner.

fixed.title: Board previews restored
fixed.description: Saved boards again show their image preview as the file thumbnail in Explorer.

fixed.title: Saving after restore
fixed.description: A restored board now saves back to its original file instead of prompting for a new one.
